query: UPDATE userPermissions up JOIN users u ON up.userId = u.id SET up.permissions = JSON_SET(up.permissions, '$.data_sync', true, '$.excel_import_customers', true, '$.excel_import_orders', true, '$.excel_import_products', true, '$.excel_import_logistics', true, '$.api_sync_execute', true, '$.api_sync_status', true) WHERE u.role = 'user';
